title: Which World Cup team are you? Take our quiz
summary: BBC Sport offers an interactive quiz to help football fans find a World Cup team to support, whether they are neutrals seeking a primary team or supporters looking to follow a second side. The quiz represents media efforts to deepen fan engagement during the tournament.
content: Whether you're a neutral in need of a team to support or just fancy following a second side, BBC Sport has got you covered.

zh.title: 你是哪支世界杯球队？做做我们的问卷
zh.summary: BBC体育提供了一个互动问卷，帮助足球迷找到支持的世界杯球队，无论他们是寻求主队的中立者还是想跟随第二支球队的支持者。该问卷代表了媒体在赛事期间加深球迷参与度的努力。

title: The pioneer in an unlikely World Cup team
summary: Desmond Armstrong made history as a pioneering player for an unlikely World Cup team in 1990, though his first media encounter at the tournament left a lasting impression for the wrong reasons. The article explores his unexpected path to football's biggest stage.
content: When Desmond Armstrong faced the media at the World Cup in 1990, the first question he got was one that would stick in his mind for the wrong reasons.

zh.title: 不太可能的世界杯球队中的先驱
zh.summary: 德斯蒙德·阿姆斯特朗在1990年作为一支不太可能的世界杯球队的先驱球员创造了历史，尽管他在比赛期间的第一次媒体接触因错误的原因留下了深刻印象。这篇文章探讨了他通往足球最大舞台的意外之路。

title: Mr Irreplaceable and Ballon d'Or contender - is this Kane's time?
summary: Harry Kane faces pressure to prove himself as more than England's irreplaceable player at the World Cup, with Ballon d'Or contention riding on his ability to perform on the tournament's biggest stage. The article examines whether this is Kane's moment to establish himself as the world's best.
content: Harry Kane has been described as irreplaceable for England, but will the World Cup provide the stage for him to prove he is now the best?

zh.title: 不可或缺的先生和金球奖竞争者——这是凯恩的时刻吗？
zh.summary: 哈里·凯恩面临着证明自己不仅仅是英格兰在世界杯上不可或缺的球员的压力，金球奖竞争取决于他在比赛最大舞台上的表现能力。这篇文章探讨了这是否是凯恩建立自己作为世界最佳球员地位的时刻。

title: 'The things that forge them are similar' - the origins of Messi & Ronaldo
summary: Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo both emerged from humble beginnings to become two of football's greatest athletes, with BBC Sport analyzing the parallel circumstances that shaped their extraordinary careers. Their similar origins underscore how adversity can forge world-class talent.
content: Both from humble beginnings, BBC Sport looks at how Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo became two of the greatest footballers of all time.

zh.title: "锻造他们的东西是相似的"——梅西和罗纳尔多的起源
zh.summary: 莱昂内尔·梅西和克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多都从卑微的出身脱颖而出，成为足球历史上最伟大的运动员之二。BBC体育频道分析了塑造他们非凡职业生涯的平行环境，他们相似的起源凸显了逆境如何能够锻造出世界级人才。

title: Iran's football team granted visas to enter US for World Cup, officials say
summary: Iran's national football team received approval to enter the United States for the World Cup, with the visa grant coming just 10 days before their opening match against New Zealand in Los Angeles. The news resolves logistical uncertainty surrounding the team's participation.
content: The approval comes just 10 days before the Iranian squad's opening match against New Zealand in Los Angeles.

zh.title: 伊朗足球队获得签证进入美国参加世界杯，官员称
zh.summary: 伊朗国家足球队获得进入美国参加世界杯的批准，签证获准距离他们在洛杉矶对阵新西兰的首场比赛仅有10天。这一消息解决了围绕该队参赛的后勤不确定性。
